hero.description: Advanced automation solutions, AI agents and software development for the future of your company.

openclaw.label: OPENCLAW
openclaw.headline: We Transform OpenClaw into Specialized Power for Your Business
openclaw.description: OpenClaw is an advanced open-source framework for building AI agents. CAIS adopts it as a foundational platform to develop specialized, tailor-made agents for each client — integrating proprietary tools and configuring workflows that solve real business problems.
openclaw.feature1_desc: We start from OpenClaw and transform it into vertical agents for your industry: finance, logistics, healthcare, manufacturing. Every agent is customized for your processes.
openclaw.feature2_desc: We connect OpenClaw to your internal systems — ERP, CRM, databases, internal APIs. The agent works directly on your data and business tools without disruption.
openclaw.feature3_desc: We design and implement intelligent workflows that orchestrate multiple agents in sequence. From data analysis to execution, all autonomously.
openclaw.feature4_desc: We monitor agent performance in real time, optimize prompts and refine behavior for ever-improving results.

hermes.label: HERMES AGENT
hermes.headline: We Build Autonomous Agents that Learn and Grow with Your Business
hermes.description: HERMES is an advanced multi-agent platform integrating self-improvement, persistent memory, and intelligent orchestration. CAIS manages it with our Python expertise, building systems that autonomously improve through use.
hermes.feature1_desc: HERMES agents analyze their own results, identify success patterns, and autonomously optimize their strategies. Every execution is an opportunity for improvement.
hermes.feature2_desc: With ChromaDB and Obsidian, every agent retains long-term memory of interactions, decisions, and outcomes. It never starts from scratch: every conversation builds on the past.
hermes.feature3_desc: Multiple specialized agents work in parallel and collaborate in sequence. Each has a precise role, and HERMES coordinates information and task handoffs between them.
hermes.feature4_desc: Our Python engineering team manages HERMES's entire lifecycle: custom development, VPS deployment, system integration, continuous monitoring, and evolutionary maintenance.

automation.label: TASK AUTOMATION
automation.headline: We Eliminate Repetitive Activities to Free Your Team
automation.description: Every day your employees lose hours on repetitive manual tasks. CAIS analyzes, designs and implements custom automation solutions that give your team time back to focus on what really matters.
automation.task1_desc: Automatic data extraction from invoices, contracts and documents. Classification, archiving and approval workflows fully automated.
automation.task2_desc: Intelligent automatic email responses, automatic ticket routing, proactive notifications and periodic reports generated and distributed automatically.
automation.task3_desc: Data extraction from heterogeneous sources, automatic CRM and ERP population, dashboards updated in real-time with customized KPIs.
automation.task4_desc: Automated onboarding, leave and permit management, automatic timesheets, contractual deadline notifications and document compliance.

python.label: PYTHON & AI
python.headline: Intelligent Applications Built with Python and Integrated AI
python.description: Our team of software engineers specialized in Python develops enterprise applications with integrated artificial intelligence. From RESTful APIs to complete platforms, every solution is built with the most advanced technologies in the industry.
python.feature1_desc: Scalable architectures with FastAPI, Django and containerized microservices. Production-ready code with automated testing and integrated CI/CD.
python.feature2_desc: Native integration of LLM models (GPT-4, Claude, Llama), RAG systems with ChromaDB, computer vision with PyTorch and advanced NLP with LangChain.
python.feature3_desc: Complete applications from frontend (React, TypeScript) to backend (Python, PostgreSQL), deploy on VPS with Docker, advanced monitoring and logging.
python.feature4_desc: OAuth2/JWT authentication, data encryption, penetration testing, GDPR compliance. Protected infrastructure with TailScale, UFW and Fail2Ban.

manifesto.heading: Our mission is to redesign business processes through intelligent automation.
manifesto.body: At CAIS, we combine high-level technical expertise with strategic vision. We integrate AI agents, automated workflows and secure infrastructures to ensure real and measurable competitiveness.

tech.heading: Advanced Technology Stack
tech.subheading: We use the most innovative technologies to build robust and scalable solutions.
tech.card1_desc: Development of predictive models, autonomous agents and advanced reasoning systems to automate complex decisions.
tech.card2_desc: Secure architectures with zero-trust network frameworks, advanced firewalls and real-time intrusion monitoring.
tech.card3_desc: Advanced knowledge management, vector databases for RAG and long-term memory systems.

services.heading: Excellence Services
services.subheading: We offer end-to-end solutions for the digital transformation of your business.
services.card1_desc: Custom AI agents that automate complex workflows, reducing operational time by 70%.
services.card2_desc: Modern web applications, scalable APIs and bespoke digital platforms for business needs.
services.card3_desc: VPS configuration, local deployment, containerization and continuous monitoring for maximum reliability.

contact.heading: Start the Transformation
contact.body: Contact us for a free strategic consultation. We will analyze your needs and design a tailor-made AI roadmap.
contact.success_body: We will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.error_name: Name must be at least 2 characters
contact.error_email: Please enter a valid email address
contact.error_message: Message must be at least 10 characters
